headlines.b: Residents advised to secure fragile objects and prepare for hallway drag races.
Experts urge humans to stop taking it personally and start providing snacks.
Officials confirm this is being treated as a "meow-jor" development. (Filed: 2026-05-19)

headlines.h: Markets React To: I've heard this song before...
headlines.b: Treat futures up. Productivity down. The couch remains occupied.
